info.english_meaning: to contractto cleanse to touch to shrinkto be crookedto bend to write to delineate
info.hindI_arTa: saMparka karanA svacCa karanA sparSa karanA weढ़A honA weढ़A liKanA reKA KIMcanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: saNkoce kucatIti syAt kocet samparcanAdizu ' (Slo. 54) iti devaH
